headline: Bernstein Initiates Coverage On Colgate-Palmolive with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $96
summary: Bernstein  analyst Cristian Rios   initiates coverage on Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $96.
